name: stress-initialization
description: Set initial zone stresses directly or compute gravitational in-situ stresses before solving. Initial stresses should be compatible with boundary conditions and the assigned constitutive model.

methods.name: uniform stress
notes: Use range clauses to assign different initial stresses to different regions.
Match stress boundaries when boundaries are stress controlled.
FLAC2D accepts 'stress-zz' for plane-strain out-of-plane stress tracking.

methods.name: gravity stress with K0 ratio
notes: Density must be assigned before 'zone initialize-stresses' (binary requirement).
Use different ratio values or overburden where geology requires it.

methods.name: manual gradient (FLAC2D)
notes: FLAC2D gradient tuple is (gx,gy); FLAC3D is (gx,gy,gz).
Gradient values are evaluated from zone centroid positions.
FLAC2D can initialize plane-strain stress-zz, but should not initialize velocity-z.

validation_checks: Run a small number of steps or 'model solve elastic' and inspect velocities/unbalanced force.
Plot zone state or plastic indicators to detect immediate yield from incompatible initial stresses.
After gravity initialization, reset displacements if the subsequent staged analysis needs zeroed movement.
